title: Fabrication of 2 x units of Multiport M600-30-SF-LV-HHW15 for SOHAR FLOUR MILLS LLC
content:
Project Name: Fabrication of 2 x units of Multiport M600-30-SF-LV-HHW15 for SOHAR FLOUR MILLS LLC.
Client: NEUERO Industrietechnik, Germany.
Project code: 4019040.
Project contract Weight: 273 Tons.
Description: Scope- Fabrication of 2 x units of Multiport M600-30-SF-LV-HHW15.
Fabrication & pre-assembly of steel structure, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting, Final complete assembly of travel gear systems (all wheel bogies), Feeding car-conveyor, Loading Boom telescopic arrangements & Seaworthy packing.
Location:  Sohar, Oman.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Food processing industry.
Status: Completed Sep 2020.
Duration: Jan 2020 – Sept 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
